items.h: More Content Added To MyAEW Including Upcoming CMLL/NJPW Pay-Per-View
items.p: Ahead of AEW x NJPW: Forbidden Door, which includes ROH, CMLL, and STARDOM, myAEW announced that a joint CMLL/NJPW pay-per-view would be livestreaming.
